testcase.name: EmailAddress Class Tests.1 Constructor Tests.1.1 Should throw an error if the default constructor is used

Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.1 Equal Inputs.1.1.1 Should return true for two identical plain addresses
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.1 Equal Inputs.1.1.2 Should return true for two identical named mailboxes
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.1 Equal Inputs.1.1.3 Should return true when case differs only in the address portion
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.1 Equal Inputs.1.1.4 Should return true for a plain address compared against itself
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.2 Unequal Inputs.1.2.1 Should return false when display names differ
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.2 Unequal Inputs.1.2.2 Should return false when addresses differ
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.2 Unequal Inputs.1.2.3 Should return false when one has a display name and the other does not
Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.1 Default Comparison (Address and Display Name).1.2 Unequal Inputs.1.2.4 Should return false when both local part and domain differ

Compare-EmailAddress Cmdlet Tests.3 String Input.3.2 Should accept named mailbox strings for both parameters
